name: PreFlect: 从事后反思到执行前前瞻性反思
content: 把反思从'act→fail→reflect→recover'前移到'plan→critique→revise→execute'。Planning Errors从历史agent轨迹蒸馏recurring success/failure patterns, 配合dynamic re-planning | different benchmarks上'outperforms strong reflection-based baselines and several more complex agent architectures' | 现有反思范式fundamentally retrospective → irreversible consequences处理不了 → trajectory-level noise → repeated trial-and-error成本。PreFlect decouples error detection from irreversible outcomes
summary: 自反层·前瞻性反思 — 补'自反层L5'的事前评估能力(目前是事后反思)
key_insights: 把反思从'act→fail→reflect→recover'前移到'plan→critique→revise→execute'。Planning Errors从历史agent轨迹蒸馏recurring success/failure patterns, 配合dynamic re-planning
different benchmarks上'outperforms strong reflection-based baselines and several more complex agent architectures'
现有反思范式fundamentally retrospective → irreversible consequences处理不了 → trajectory-level noise → repeated trial-and-error成本。PreFlect decouples error detection from irreversible outcomes
xihe_relevance: 曦和自反层L5目前主要是事后(RuminationScheduler事后处理)。PreFlect补'plan-phase reflection'——但落地需谨慎: 门控调制器已承担'关系注意力向量', PreFlect的'规划错误蒸馏'可作门控调制器的plan-time增强维度 | 融合落点: C. 补充 → gate_modulator.plan_time_reflection (D2兴趣匹配维度的plan-time增强, 与既有门控正交不撞车)
